cluster_name: South Yorkshire Mayoral Combined Authority Innovation Ecosystem
strap: South Yorkshire Mayoral Combined Authority's innovation footprint draws £2.38bn of UKRI lead-led funding across 2,419 grants spanning 3 active clusters, with South Yorkshire Advanced Manufacturing (44%) the largest single cluster and Sheffield (48%) the dominant regional anchor by UKRI £.
behaviour: The region shows high-confidence "Validation–Coordination" stabilisation stacks at ecosystem grain — validation activity recurs through programmes and partnerships without the testing-and-narrowing motion that converts capability into market position.
